# GAK Creations

> The archive of Gerald Allen Knowles — architect, artist, and traveler. Architectural drawings and travel collages from Europe and the Atlantic islands, available as fine art prints.

## Pages

- [Home](/): About the artist and selected works from the collection.
- [Shop](https://gak-creations.printify.me): Fine art prints, made to order and shipped worldwide via Printify.

## Optional

- [Shipping Policy](/shipping-policy): Production times, delivery estimates, and carriers.
- [Refund & Returns Policy](/refund-policy): Returns, refunds, and replacements.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Website and purchase terms.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How personal information is collected and used.
